case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS GONZALEZ, MARIA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, MARIA CENTENO, MARIO $2,536.39 PRINCIPAL, $2,529.34 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,065.73, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE NO. 714928.
